parts.name: Part 1
parts.instructions: You must answer this question. Write your answer in about 100 words.

tasks.lead: Read this email from your English teacher, Mr Petrov, and the notes you have made.

stimulus.head: EMAIL
stimulus.body:
From: Mr Petrov
Subject: School photography contest

Dear Class,

Our school is holding a photography contest! The theme is "My Town", and you can enter one photo each. The winning photos will be shown at the school entrance.

Would you like to take part? Tell me what kind of photo you are planning to take. We also need a name for the exhibition — any ideas?

Mr Petrov

bullets: say you would like to take part
describe the photo you are planning to take
suggest a name for the exhibition
ask one question about the contest rules
tasks.write: Write your email to Mr Petrov.

parts.name: Part 2
parts.instructions: Answer one of these questions. Write your answer in about 100 words.

tasks.lead: You see this announcement in your school English-language magazine.

stimulus.title: A PHOTO I WILL NEVER DELETE
stimulus.body: We all have hundreds of photos on our phones, but some are more special than others. Write an article about one photo you will never delete, describing it and explaining why it matters to you. The best articles will be published next month.

bullets: when and where it was taken
why you will never delete it

tasks.lead: Your English teacher has asked you to write a story.
tasks.startSentence: When Ivan looked at the photo more carefully, he saw something strange in the background.

stimulus.body:
Your story must begin with this sentence:

When Ivan looked at the photo more carefully, he saw something strange in the background.
